name: Tommy Davidson
blurb: His television work led to several Showtime stand-up specials.
bio: Tommy Davidson is an American stand-up comedian and actor known as an original cast member of the sketch series In Living Color, where he performed impressions of figures such as Michael Jackson and Sammy Davis Jr. He built his career working comedy clubs after winning an amateur competition at the Apollo Theater in 1987. His television work led to several Showtime stand-up specials.

timeline.ev: Born November 10 in Rolling Fork, Mississippi
Began stand-up career in Washington, D.C.
Won an amateur stand-up competition at the Apollo Theater
Won amateur stand-up competition at the Apollo Theater
Became an original cast member of In Living Color
Original cast member on Fox's In Living Color
Voiced Oscar Proud on Disney's The Proud Family

accolades: Original cast member of In Living Color
Original cast member of In Living Color (1990-1994)
Won the Apollo Theater amateur stand-up competition (1987)

flags.bits_honest_gap_note: No embeddable official stand-up clips found. His Showtime specials (Takin it to DC, Illin in Philly, On Strength of New York) appear only as fan re-uploads; Gotham Comedy Live sets are hosted by third-party reposters (Laugh Trax), and clip-aggregator channels (BlackTree TV) are not official. His own channel hosts personal/music content, not official stand-up sets.
